meta.title: 小学生必背古诗
meta.subtitle: Classical Chinese Poems for Primary School

fields.poem: id, title, titlePinyin, titleEn, author, dynasty, grade, volume, lines[], chars[], notes{}
fields.line: text, pinyin, zh (白话译文), en (translation)
fields.char: char, pinyin, zh (字义), en (gloss); deduplicated within a poem, 多音字 noted in zh
fields.notes: background / culture / rhetoric, each { zh, en }
fields.sandhi: 连读变调 (tone sandhi) list: [{ text, rule, base, read, value, markChange, where, zh, en }]. rule ∈ 上上变调 / 半上声 / 半去声 / 一字变调 / 不字变调. base = 本调 pinyin, read = 实际读音 pinyin, value = 实际调值 (35/211/53/51). markChange=true when the pinyin tone mark itself changes (上上变调/一/不); markChange=false for 调值-only refinements (半上声 211, 半去声 53) where spelling is unchanged. Computed over each line and the title as separate prosodic units (a unit-final 上声/去声 keeps its full citation tone). 半去声 only applies within a 2-syllable foot, never across the caesura/foot boundary. 'where' is the containing line, or 题目 for the title. Empty array = 全诗按本调朗读.
fields.tags: theme tags: array of category keys (multi-label, central themes only). Definitions in poems/categories.json.

lines.zh: 鹅啊，鹅啊，鹅啊，
lines.en: Goose, goose, goose,

lines.zh: 弯着脖子向着天空高声歌唱。
lines.en: bends its neck and sings to the sky.

lines.zh: 白色的羽毛漂浮在碧绿的水面上，
lines.en: White feathers float on green water,

lines.zh: 红色的脚掌拨动着清澈的水波。
lines.en: red webbed feet stir the clear ripples.

chars.zh: 弯曲（多音字：qǔ 指歌曲）。
脖子的后部，这里指脖子。

background.zh: 相传骆宾王七岁时所作，是一首咏物诗，也是他的成名之作。
background.en: Said to have been written by Luo Binwang at age seven; this 'object-chanting' poem made his name as a child prodigy.

culture.zh: 骆宾王是"初唐四杰"之一。鹅在中国文化中常与文人雅趣相联（如王羲之爱鹅）。
culture.en: Luo Binwang was one of the 'Four Eminences of the Early Tang.' Geese were a refined motif among scholars (e.g. the calligrapher Wang Xizhi loved geese).

rhetoric.zh: 首句反复"鹅"模拟鹅叫；以颜色对比（白对绿、红对清）和动静结合，由声到形、由远及近地描绘白鹅。
rhetoric.en: The repeated '鹅' mimics the goose's call; vivid colour contrasts (white/green, red/clear) and the shift from sound to image, far to near, paint the goose dynamically.

sandhi.zh: "咏"是上声，在非上声"鹅"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒng。
sandhi.en: 咏 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 鹅; the written pinyin stays yǒng.

sandhi.zh: "掌"是上声，在非上声"拨"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhǎng。
sandhi.en: 掌 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 拨; the written pinyin stays zhǎng.

lines.zh: 江南到了可以采摘莲蓬的季节，
lines.en: In the south of the river it is time to gather lotus,

lines.zh: 莲叶长得多么茂盛繁密。
lines.en: and how lush and crowded the lotus leaves are!

lines.zh: 鱼儿在莲叶间嬉戏游动。
lines.en: Fish play among the lotus leaves.

lines.zh: 鱼儿在莲叶东边游戏，
lines.en: Fish play east of the lotus leaves,

lines.zh: 鱼儿在莲叶西边游戏，
lines.en: fish play west of the lotus leaves,

lines.zh: 鱼儿在莲叶南边游戏，
lines.en: fish play south of the lotus leaves,

lines.zh: 鱼儿在莲叶北边游戏。
lines.en: fish play north of the lotus leaves.

chars.zh: 田田：形容莲叶茂盛、相连的样子。

background.zh: 选自汉乐府民歌，是一首采莲歌，反映江南水乡采莲劳动的欢乐场景。
background.en: A Han-dynasty Yuefu folk song—a lotus-gathering work song capturing the joy of labour in the southern water towns.

culture.zh: 乐府是汉代采集民歌的官署，后指这类配乐歌唱的诗。江南采莲是水乡风物的典型意象。
culture.en: 'Yuefu' was the Han music bureau that collected folk songs; the lotus harvest is a signature image of the southern waterscape.

rhetoric.zh: 后四句用"东西南北"的方位反复（复沓），以重叠句式表现鱼儿四处游动的活泼，富有民歌的节奏与画面感。
rhetoric.en: The final four lines repeat the four directions (incremental repetition), a folk-song device that makes the darting fish vivid and rhythmic.

sandhi.zh: "可"在上声"采"前变读阳平（第二声）：kě→ké。
sandhi.en: 可 comes before the third-tone 采, so it is read in second tone: kě → ké.

sandhi.zh: "采"是上声，在非上声"莲"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎi。
sandhi.en: 采 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 莲; the written pinyin stays cǎi.

lines.zh: 远远望去，山有鲜明的颜色，
lines.en: Seen from afar, the mountains have colour,

lines.zh: 走近去听，水却没有声音。
lines.en: drawn near, the water makes no sound.

lines.zh: 春天过去了，花儿却依然开着，
lines.en: Spring departs, yet the flowers remain,

lines.zh: 人走近了，鸟儿也不受惊吓。
lines.en: people approach, but the birds take no fright.

chars.zh: 仍然、依旧（多音字：huán 归还）。

background.zh: 这是一首谜语诗，谜底是"画"。诗中描写的景物都与现实相反，处处暗示画的特征。
background.en: A riddle poem whose answer is 'a painting'; every line describes the opposite of reality, hinting that the scene is painted.

culture.zh: 题画诗在中国传统中常见。诗、书、画相结合是文人艺术的重要特色。（作者旧题王维，亦有传为佚名。）
culture.en: Poems written about paintings are a classic genre; the union of poetry, calligraphy and painting is central to literati art. (Traditionally ascribed to Wang Wei, though authorship is uncertain.)

rhetoric.zh: 全诗用对比与反衬：远近、动静、有声无声、来去相对；以"反常"现象巧设悬念，构思精巧。
rhetoric.en: Built on contrasts—far/near, motion/stillness, sound/silence—the 'impossible' scene sets up the riddle with great ingenuity.

sandhi.zh: "远"是上声，在非上声"看"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yuǎn。
sandhi.en: 远 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 看; the written pinyin stays yuǎn.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"色"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 色; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"无"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 无; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "鸟"是上声，在非上声"不"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：niǎo。
sandhi.en: 鸟 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 不; the written pinyin stays niǎo.

lines.zh: 农民在正午烈日下锄地除草，
lines.en: Hoeing the grain under the noonday sun,

lines.zh: 汗水滴落在禾苗下的泥土里。
lines.en: sweat drips onto the soil beneath the seedlings.

lines.zh: 有谁知道盘中的饭食，
lines.en: Who knows that the food in the bowl,

lines.zh: 每一粒都饱含着辛勤的劳苦。
lines.en: grain by grain, is all hard-won toil?

background.zh: 李绅目睹农民劳作的艰辛而作《悯农》二首，此为其二，劝人珍惜粮食。
background.en: Li Shen wrote the two 'Sympathy for the Farmers' poems after witnessing the hardship of farm labour; this second one urges us to cherish food.

culture.zh: "谁知盘中餐，粒粒皆辛苦"已成为劝人节约粮食的千古名句。
culture.en: The closing couplet has become the proverbial reminder, across the centuries, to value every grain of food.

rhetoric.zh: 前两句白描劳作的画面，后两句以设问（"谁知"）引出议论，叠词"粒粒"强调，对比鲜明，发人深省。
rhetoric.en: Plain depiction of toil is followed by a rhetorical question; the reduplicated '粒粒' drives the point home with sharp contrast.

sandhi.zh: "悯"是上声，在非上声"农"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǐn。
sandhi.en: 悯 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 农; the written pinyin stays mǐn.

sandhi.zh: "粒"是去声，在去声"粒"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：lì。
sandhi.en: 粒 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 粒; the written pinyin stays lì.

poems.title: 古朗月行（节选）
poems.titleEn: Ancient Song of the Bright Moon (excerpt)
poems.author: 李白

lines.zh: 小时候不认识月亮，
lines.en: As a child I did not know the moon,

lines.zh: 把它叫作白玉的圆盘。
lines.en: and called it a plate of white jade.

lines.zh: 又怀疑它是瑶台上的明镜，
lines.en: Then I wondered if it were the mirror of the Jade Terrace,

lines.zh: 飞悬在青云的顶端。
lines.en: flying at the edge of the blue clouds.

chars.zh: 古乐府诗的一种体裁（多音字：háng 行列）。
美玉，瑶台指神仙居住的地方。

background.zh: 《古朗月行》是李白借乐府旧题创作的诗，课文节选开头四句，写儿童眼中天真的月亮。
background.en: Li Bai composed this on an old Yuefu title; the textbook excerpts the opening four lines, seen through a child's innocent eyes.

culture.zh: "白玉盘""瑶台镜"用神话仙境的意象写月，体现古人对月亮的浪漫想象。
culture.en: The 'white-jade plate' and 'Jade Terrace mirror' draw on mythic, immortal imagery, reflecting the romantic Chinese imagination of the moon.

rhetoric.zh: 运用比喻（把月亮比作白玉盘、瑶台镜），以儿童的口吻和联想，想象奇特，天真烂漫。
rhetoric.en: Vivid metaphors liken the moon to a jade plate and a fairy mirror; the childlike voice gives it wonder and innocence.

sandhi.zh: "古"在上声"朗"前变读阳平（第二声）：gǔ→gú。
sandhi.en: 古 comes before the third-tone 朗, so it is read in second tone: gǔ → gú.

sandhi.zh: "朗"是上声，在非上声"月"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǎng。
sandhi.en: 朗 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 月; the written pinyin stays lǎng.

sandhi.zh: "小"是上声，在非上声"时"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 小 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 时; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

lines.zh: 风能吹落深秋的树叶，
lines.en: It can strip the leaves of late autumn,

lines.zh: 也能催开早春二月的鲜花。
lines.en: and coax open the flowers of spring.

lines.zh: 吹过江面掀起千尺巨浪，
lines.en: Crossing the river it raises waves a thousand feet high,

lines.zh: 吹入竹林使万竿翠竹倾斜。
lines.en: entering the bamboo, it bends ten thousand stalks aslant.

chars.zh: 能够、会（多音字：jiè 押解，xiè 姓）。
长度单位，这里形容浪高。

background.zh: 李峤是初唐诗人，擅长咏物诗。此诗通篇咏"风"而不出现"风"字，是一首巧妙的谜语式咏物诗。
background.en: Li Qiao, an Early Tang poet skilled at object poems, describes the wind throughout without ever using the word 'wind'—a clever riddle-like piece.

culture.zh: 全诗未见"风"字，却处处写风的力量，体现古典咏物诗"不著一字，尽得风流"的追求。
culture.en: Though the word 'wind' never appears, its power is everywhere—exemplifying the classical ideal of conveying a thing without naming it.

rhetoric.zh: 运用对偶（落叶对开花、过江对入竹）和夸张（千尺浪、万竿斜），以数字与动态写出风的威力。
rhetoric.en: Antithetical couplets and hyperbole ('a thousand-foot wave', 'ten thousand stalks') use numbers and motion to convey the wind's force.

sandhi.zh: "解"是上声，在非上声"落"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiě。
sandhi.en: 解 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 落; the written pinyin stays jiě.

sandhi.zh: "二"是去声，在去声"月"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：èr。
sandhi.en: 二 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 月; the written pinyin stays èr.

sandhi.zh: "尺"是上声，在非上声"浪"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：chǐ。
sandhi.en: 尺 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 浪; the written pinyin stays chǐ.

lines.zh: 春夜睡得香甜，不知不觉天已亮了，
lines.en: In spring I sleep, unaware of the dawn,

lines.zh: 到处都能听到鸟儿的啼鸣。
lines.en: everywhere I hear the birds singing.

lines.zh: 回想昨夜的阵阵风雨声，
lines.en: Last night came the sound of wind and rain,

lines.zh: 不知道有多少花儿被打落了。
lines.en: who knows how many blossoms fell?

chars.zh: 察觉、感觉到（多音字：jiào 睡觉）。

background.zh: 孟浩然是唐代著名的山水田园诗人，此诗写春日清晨醒来时的所闻所感，意境清新。
background.en: Meng Haoran, a famed Tang landscape-and-pastoral poet, captures the fresh feeling of waking on a spring morning.

culture.zh: 惜春、伤春是中国古诗常见主题；本诗以喜春起、以惜花落收，含蓄隽永。
culture.en: Cherishing and lamenting spring is a recurring theme in Chinese poetry; the poem opens in delight and closes in gentle regret for fallen blossoms.

rhetoric.zh: 全诗以听觉落笔（鸟啼、风雨），由声写景，叠词“处处”增添韵律；结句以设问留白，引人遐想，含而不露。
rhetoric.en: It is written through sound (birdsong, wind and rain), the reduplicated chùchù (everywhere) lending rhythm; the closing rhetorical question leaves an evocative, understated space for the imagination.

sandhi.zh: "处"是去声，在去声"处"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：chù。
sandhi.en: 处 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 处; the written pinyin stays chù.

sandhi.zh: "雨"是上声，在非上声"声"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǔ。
sandhi.en: 雨 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 声; the written pinyin stays yǔ.

lines.pinyin: lǐ bái chéng zhōu jiāng yù xíng,
lines.zh: 李白乘船正要出发离开，
lines.en: Li Bai aboard a boat, about to set off,

lines.pinyin: hū wén àn shàng tà gē shēng.
lines.zh: 忽然听见岸上传来踏歌的声音。
lines.en: suddenly hears foot-stamping songs from the shore.

lines.pinyin: táo huā tán shuǐ shēn qiān chǐ,
lines.zh: 桃花潭的水即使深达千尺，
lines.en: Though Peach Blossom Pool is a thousand feet deep,

lines.pinyin: bù jí wāng lún sòng wǒ qíng.
lines.zh: 也比不上汪伦送别我的深情。
lines.en: it cannot match the love with which Wang Lun sees me off.

chars.zh: 踏歌：边走边以脚踏地打拍子唱歌。

background.zh: 汪伦是李白的友人，曾热情款待李白。李白离别时，汪伦踏歌相送，李白作此诗以谢。
background.en: Wang Lun was Li Bai's host and friend; as the poet left, Wang came stamping out a song to see him off, and Li Bai wrote this in thanks.

culture.zh: "踏歌"是古代一种手拉手、以脚踏地为节拍的群众歌舞，是民间送别的方式之一。
culture.en: 'Foot-stamping song' (踏歌) was a communal song-dance, hands linked and feet keeping time—one folk way of bidding farewell.

rhetoric.zh: 末两句用比较（衬托/夸张）：以千尺潭水之深反衬汪伦情意之深，化无形之情为可感的形象。
rhetoric.en: The final couplet uses comparison and hyperbole: the thousand-foot pool sets off the even deeper friendship, making an abstract emotion tangible.

sandhi.zh: "李"是上声，在非上声"白"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：lǐ。
sandhi.en: 李 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 白; the written pinyin stays lǐ.

sandhi.zh: "岸"是去声，在去声"上"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：àn。
sandhi.en: 岸 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 上; the written pinyin stays àn.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"深"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 深; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "我"是上声，在非上声"情"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：wǒ。
sandhi.en: 我 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 情; the written pinyin stays wǒ.

lines.zh: 床前洒下一片明亮的月光，
lines.en: Before my bed, the bright moonlight,

lines.zh: 好像是地上结了一层白霜。
lines.en: I wonder if it is frost on the ground.

lines.zh: 抬起头来望着天上的明月，
lines.en: I lift my head and gaze at the bright moon,

lines.zh: 低下头来思念自己的家乡。
lines.en: I lower my head and long for home.

background.zh: 李白客居他乡，夜晚见月生情，写下这首脍炙人口的思乡名作。
background.en: Far from home, Li Bai saw the night moon and was moved to write this best-loved poem of homesickness.

culture.zh: 明月寄托思乡之情是中国诗歌的传统意象；本诗语言浅白，流传极广，几乎人人能诵。
culture.en: The bright moon as a vessel of homesickness is a classic Chinese image; the plain language has made this one of the most universally recited poems.

rhetoric.zh: 用比喻（月光疑似霜）写清冷夜色；"举头""低头"动作对仗，由景入情，含蓄而真挚。
rhetoric.en: A metaphor (moonlight mistaken for frost) sets a cold scene; the paired gestures 'raise the head / lower the head' move from scene to feeling, restrained yet heartfelt.

sandhi.zh: "静"是去声，在去声"夜"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：jìng。
sandhi.en: 静 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 夜; the written pinyin stays jìng.

sandhi.zh: "地"是去声，在去声"上"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：dì。
sandhi.en: 地 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 上; the written pinyin stays dì.

sandhi.zh: "举"是上声，在非上声"头"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jǔ。
sandhi.en: 举 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 头; the written pinyin stays jǔ.

poems.title: 寻隐者不遇
poems.titleEn: Looking for a Hermit, but Missing Him
poems.author: 贾岛

lines.zh: 在松树下询问隐者的小徒弟，
lines.en: Beneath the pines I ask the boy,

lines.zh: 他说师父采药去了。
lines.en: he says his master has gone to gather herbs.

lines.zh: 只知道就在这座山里，
lines.en: He is only somewhere in this mountain,

lines.zh: 可是云雾深浓，不知道具体在哪里。
lines.en: but the clouds are deep—who knows just where?

chars.zh: 童子：小孩，这里指隐者的徒弟。

background.zh: 贾岛以"苦吟"著称。此诗写访隐者不遇的经过，语言极简而意味深长。
background.en: Jia Dao was famed for painstakingly 'chanting' his lines; this poem recounts a fruitless visit to a hermit with extreme economy and depth.

culture.zh: 隐者、采药、白云、青松是中国隐逸文化的典型意象，寄托对超脱世俗的向往。
culture.en: The hermit, herb-gathering, white clouds and green pines are stock images of reclusion, voicing a longing to rise above worldly life.

rhetoric.zh: 全诗采用寓问于答（省略问句）的方式，三问三答凝缩在四句中；以云深烘托隐者行踪缥缈。
rhetoric.en: The poem hides the questions inside the answers—three exchanges compressed into four lines—while the deep clouds suggest the hermit's elusive whereabouts.

sandhi.zh: "隐"在上声"者"前变读阳平（第二声）：yǐn→yín。
sandhi.en: 隐 comes before the third-tone 者, so it is read in second tone: yǐn → yín.

sandhi.zh: "者"是上声，在非上声"不"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhě。
sandhi.en: 者 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 不; the written pinyin stays zhě.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"遇"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 遇 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "采"是上声，在非上声"药"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎi。
sandhi.en: 采 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 药; the written pinyin stays cǎi.

sandhi.zh: "只"是上声，在非上声"在"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zhǐ。
sandhi.en: 只 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 在; the written pinyin stays zhǐ.

sandhi.zh: "此"是上声，在非上声"山"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǐ。
sandhi.en: 此 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 山; the written pinyin stays cǐ.

lines.zh: 小孩子撑着一只小船，
lines.en: A little child punts a little boat,

lines.zh: 偷偷采了白莲蓬回来。
lines.en: secretly picks white lotus and returns.

lines.zh: 他不懂得隐藏自己的踪迹，
lines.en: Not knowing how to hide his tracks,

lines.zh: 水面的浮萍被船划开一道痕迹。
lines.en: the duckweed parts in a tell-tale trail.

chars.zh: 浮萍：漂浮在水面的小草。

background.zh: 白居易以平易近人的诗风著称。此诗截取小孩偷采白莲的生活片段，充满童趣。
background.en: Bai Juyi was known for plain, accessible verse; here he catches a charming everyday moment of a child sneaking off to pick lotus.

culture.zh: 采莲是江南夏日生活的常见情景；诗以儿童视角，体现古人对天真童心的欣赏。
culture.en: Lotus-picking was a familiar summer scene in the south; the child's-eye view reflects a fondness for innocent, playful childhood.

rhetoric.zh: 白描手法，抓住"偷""不解藏"的细节；以浮萍"一道开"的留痕，含蓄写出孩子的天真可爱。
rhetoric.en: Plain depiction seizes on the words 'secretly' and 'not knowing how to hide'; the parting trail of duckweed quietly betrays the child's endearing naivety.

sandhi.zh: "小"是上声，在非上声"娃"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 小 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 娃; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "小"在上声"艇"前变读阳平（第二声）：xiǎo→xiáo。
sandhi.en: 小 comes before the third-tone 艇, so it is read in second tone: xiǎo → xiáo.

sandhi.zh: "采"是上声，在非上声"白"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：cǎi。
sandhi.en: 采 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 白; the written pinyin stays cǎi.

sandhi.zh: "解"是上声，在非上声"藏"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：jiě。
sandhi.en: 解 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 藏; the written pinyin stays jiě.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"道"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 道 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

lines.pinyin: quán yǎn wú shēng xī xì liú,
lines.zh: 泉眼悄无声息，仿佛舍不得让细水流出，
lines.en: The spring's mouth, silent, seems to grudge its thin trickle,

lines.pinyin: shù yīn zhào shuǐ ài qíng róu.
lines.zh: 树荫倒映在水面上，喜爱这晴日的柔和。
lines.en: tree shade mirrored on the water loves the soft, fine day.

lines.pinyin: xiǎo hé cái lù jiān jiān jiǎo,
lines.zh: 嫩荷刚刚露出尖尖的小角，
lines.en: The young lotus has just shown its sharp little tips,

lines.pinyin: zǎo yǒu qīng tíng lì shàng tóu.
lines.zh: 早就有蜻蜓立在它的上头了。
lines.en: and already a dragonfly has perched on top.

chars.zh: 露出（多音字：lòu 口语义同）。
尖尖：形容荷叶刚露出的样子。
尖角，这里指荷叶的嫩芽。

background.zh: 杨万里是南宋"诚斋体"的代表，善于捕捉自然界的细微生趣。此诗描绘初夏小池的清新景致。
background.en: Yang Wanli, master of the lively 'Chengzhai style' of the Southern Song, excelled at tiny natural delights; here he paints a fresh early-summer pond.

culture.zh: "小荷才露尖尖角，早有蜻蜓立上头"常被用来比喻崭露头角的新人。
culture.en: The closing couplet is often quoted to describe a promising newcomer just beginning to make a mark.

rhetoric.zh: 运用拟人（泉眼"惜"、树阴"爱"），赋予景物情感；以"才露""早有"的呼应，写出生机盎然的瞬间。
rhetoric.en: Personification ('the spring grudges', 'the shade loves') animates the scene, while 'just shown / already perched' captures a moment brimming with life.

sandhi.zh: "小"是上声，在非上声"池"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 小 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 池; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "眼"是上声，在非上声"无"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǎn。
sandhi.en: 眼 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 无; the written pinyin stays yǎn.

sandhi.zh: "水"是上声，在非上声"爱"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：shuǐ。
sandhi.en: 水 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 爱; the written pinyin stays shuǐ.

sandhi.zh: "小"是上声，在非上声"荷"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xiǎo。
sandhi.en: 小 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 荷; the written pinyin stays xiǎo.

sandhi.zh: "早"在上声"有"前变读阳平（第二声）：zǎo→záo。
sandhi.en: 早 comes before the third-tone 有, so it is read in second tone: zǎo → záo.

sandhi.zh: "有"是上声，在非上声"蜻"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：yǒu。
sandhi.en: 有 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 蜻; the written pinyin stays yǒu.

sandhi.zh: "立"是去声，在去声"上"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：lì。
sandhi.en: 立 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 上; the written pinyin stays lì.

lines.pinyin: tóu shàng hóng guān bù yòng cái,
lines.zh: 头上鲜红的鸡冠不用裁剪就天生美丽，
lines.en: The red comb on its head needs no cutting to shape,

lines.pinyin: mǎn shēn xuě bái zǒu jiāng lái.
lines.zh: 一身雪白的羽毛，昂首走来。
lines.en: snow-white all over, it comes strutting along.

lines.pinyin: píng shēng bù gǎn qīng yán yǔ,
lines.zh: 它平生不敢随便地啼叫，
lines.en: All its life it dares not crow lightly,

lines.pinyin: yī jiào qiān mén wàn hù kāi.
lines.zh: 可是一旦啼叫，千家万户都打开门来。
lines.en: but at a single cry, a thousand gates swing open.

chars.zh: 助词，无实义（走将来：走过来）。
万；千门万户指家家户户。

background.zh: 唐寅（唐伯虎）是明代著名的画家、文学家。这是一首题画诗，咏画中的雄鸡。
background.en: Tang Yin (Tang Bohu), a celebrated Ming painter and writer, wrote this poem inscribed on his own painting of a rooster.

culture.zh: 公鸡报晓、唤醒千家万户，象征光明与希望；古人视鸡有"文、武、勇、仁、信"五德。
culture.en: The rooster heralding dawn for every household symbolizes light and hope; tradition credits the cock with five virtues (civility, valour, courage, kindness, trust).

rhetoric.zh: 前两句写鸡之形（红冠、雪白），后两句借物言志：以雄鸡一鸣天下白，寄托不鸣则已、一鸣惊人的抱负。
rhetoric.en: The first half paints the bird's form; the second turns to symbol—one crow lights the world—voicing the ambition to astonish all at a single stroke.

sandhi.zh: "不"在去声"用"前变读阳平（第二声）：bù→bú。
sandhi.en: 不 before the fourth-tone 用 changes to second tone: bù → bú.

sandhi.zh: "满"是上声，在非上声"身"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：mǎn。
sandhi.en: 满 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 身; the written pinyin stays mǎn.

sandhi.zh: "雪"是上声，在非上声"白"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：xuě。
sandhi.en: 雪 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 白; the written pinyin stays xuě.

sandhi.zh: "走"是上声，在非上声"将"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：zǒu。
sandhi.en: 走 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 将; the written pinyin stays zǒu.

sandhi.zh: "敢"是上声，在非上声"轻"前读"半上"（调值211），拼音不变：gǎn。
sandhi.en: 敢 (third tone) is shortened to a half-third tone (pitch 211) before the non-third-tone 轻; the written pinyin stays gǎn.

sandhi.zh: "一"在去声"叫"前变读阳平（第二声）：yī→yí。
sandhi.en: 一 before the fourth-tone 叫 changes to second tone: yī → yí.

sandhi.zh: "万"是去声，在去声"户"前读"半去"（调值53），拼音不变：wàn。
sandhi.en: 万 (fourth tone) is shortened to a half-fourth tone (pitch 53) before the fourth-tone 户; the written pinyin stays wàn.
